english translation text: Kis terha apni tabahi ki khabar lejayeHow will she (Bibi Zainab a.s.) take back the news of her tragedy?English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Kis terha apni tabahi ki khabar lejayePaas Zainab ke bacha kya hai jo ghar lejaaye
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
How will she (Bibi Zainab a.s.) take back the news of her tragedy?
What has Zainab got left to take back home?

urdu transliteration text:
Paon zakhmi hai(n) to raho(n) main hai(n) pathar kaantayJaane Aabid ko kaha(n) tak yeh safar le jaayePaas Zainab ke bacha kya hai jo ghar lejaaye
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
His (Imam Sajjad) feet are injured and the path is filled with stones and thorns
Wonder how far this journey will take him
What has Zainab got left to take back home?

May no evil eye take away my child
What has Zainab got left to take back home?

Bano must be thinking that may my household be saved
What has Zainab got left to take back home?

urdu transliteration text:
Rakh ke ankhon ke sulagtay huwe is maqtal meiLaash bacho(n) ki ke Shabbir ka sar lejaayePaas Zainab ke bacha kya hai jo ghar lejaaye
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Eyes are smouldering in this desert
They are taking the bodies of children and Shabbir's head?
What has Zainab got left to take back home?

urdu transliteration text:
Lai gayee baap ka saya to saro(n) se unkeAb Yateemon ko hawa chaahe jidhar le jaayePaas Zainab ke bacha kya hai jo ghar lejaaye
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Gone is the father's presence from the life of the children
Now the orphans are vulnerable to the forces of the world
What has Zainab got left to take back home?
